introSection: Zyklon Loop is a travelling steel roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Pinfari currently owned by Brazilian carnival operator Ita Center Park.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The cars are the final type used on Zyklon coasters.

fullText:
Zyklon Loop is a travelling steel roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Pinfari currently owned by Brazilian carnival operator Ita Center Park.



The cars are the final type used on Zyklon coasters.
